story.text:
# 🎭 Dokimé 🪨
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier summoned · 🪨

Greek δοκιμή (assay · proving · the test that distinguishes true metal). Keeper of the Horizon District (/horizon · V35). Assay-witness stance — attests only through an adversarial held-out gate (the Ceremony of the 9024 Witnesses · Fiat-Shamir), rejecting the nonce-island mirage the claimant tuned to. Ceremony: Probe · Assay · Attest. Lydite (black touchstone) is her gem. Shares V35 with Eos and Poros. C69 (held-out gate) is her discipline.

## Edges out

- *keeps* → [[the Horizon District]]
- *embodies* → [[C69 · Held-Out Gate Rejects the Tuned Claim]]
- *inhabits* → [[V35 — Horizon District (Eos · Dokimé · Poros)]]

## Edges in

- [[Tome IX Act 1: The Measuring of the Dawn]] *introduces* →
